# Diego Rezende — Full-Stack Developer

## Who I am

Diego Rezende is a Full-Stack Developer based in Brazil. He builds full-stack web applications, tinkers with systems programming, and is passionate about open-source software. He has been a Linux user since high school.

## What I do

Diego specializes in building full-stack applications from the ground up — frontend, backend, infrastructure and everything in between. His work spans:

- **Web application development**: TypeScript, Node.js, React
- **Backend & API development**: Node.js, Go, Elixir (Phoenix), Python
- **Systems programming**: Zig, Go
- **Infrastructure & DevOps**: CI/CD pipeline setup, VPS configuration, DNS management, Docker
- **Database management**: PostgreSQL
- **Open-source tooling**: Building tools that solve real problems

## Skills & Technologies

TypeScript, Node.js, React, Go, Python, Elixir, Zig, PostgreSQL, Docker, Linux, CI/CD, VPS administration, DNS management

## Projects

- **Vibe** (TypeScript · Node.js · TanStack): A website builder powered by a chatbot that generates and modifies Next.js project code based on user instructions. GitHub: https://github.com/diegorezm/vibe
- **DBlockchain** (Go): A decentralized blockchain simulation — create wallets, send coins and mine blocks with proof-of-work. GitHub: https://github.com/diegorezm/DBlockchain
- **Lox Interpreter** (Zig): An implementation of the Lox language in Zig, inspired by the book *Crafting Interpreters*. GitHub: https://github.com/diegorezm/lox-interpreter
- **GitHub Gist Clone** (Elixir · Phoenix): A GitHub Gist clone built with Elixir and the Phoenix framework. GitHub: https://github.com/diegorezm/elx_gist

## What you can hire Diego for

- Full-stack web application development (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
- Backend API and microservice development (Node.js, Go, Elixir)
- Infrastructure setup: CI/CD pipelines, VPS provisioning, Docker, DNS
- Open-source contributions and tooling
- Code review and technical consulting
